penalties.title: Saturday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a Saturday — 150% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Saturday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a Saturday — 175% of the base rate.

penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a Sunday — 200% of the base rate.

penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a Sunday — 225% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a public holiday — 250% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a public holiday — 275% of the base rate.
